name: Coconut Snowball Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the vanilla ice cream into 8 small balls and immediately roll in coconut flakes.
2. Place the ice cream balls on wax paper-lined baking sheets and freeze until ready to use.
3. In a large saucepan, whisk together cocoa powder and milk. Stir in rum if desired, cream of coconut, and coconut extract.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium-high heat.
5. Pour the sauce into 8 large heatproof mugs.
6. Float an ice cream ball in each mug of cocoa.
7. If desired, drizzle the ice cream ball with chocolate ice cream sauce and top with a Maraschino cherry.
Makes 8 servings.
